content: Orchestrator, read catalog/skills.json for the domain roster: 10 C-Suite domains (ceo, chief-of-staff, cto, coo, cfo, cro, cmo, clo, chro, domain-specialist) plus Platform engine skills.

Listed .pmcro/trails/: only ceo (9 trails), chief-of-staff (this cycle's own, 1st ever), and cto (4 trails, now including this session's f5886d04 and 6cc3b341) have any trail history. coo, cfo, cro, cmo, clo, chro, domain-specialist have zero -- 'no cycles run yet' for each.

Pulled disposition.json for every ceo and cto trail rather than only the single most recent, since the brief benefits from showing the accept/needs-approval/needs-revision mix, not just the latest line -- still identifying the most recent trail per domain as the primary status line per brief-session.md's own instruction.

Most recent per domain: ceo -> a67f85ba (accept, Constitution ratification); cto -> 6cc3b341 (needs-approval, memory-bank unwind) with f5886d04 (accept, ddec42d1 closure) also this session; chief-of-staff -> this trail itself, in progress.

Generate SESSION-BRIEF.md at repo root per the Session Brief Convention (cto/6cc3b341): one turn per domain, persona-voiced, EC-VERIFY-FIRST-001-checked against what's actually on disk, hand-off addressing played back where present (only fe7be6ff/a67f85ba/f5886d04/6cc3b341 carry Article 4 addressing -- older trails predate it and get the 'no hand-off record' note).
